reviews.review_msg: awful
Great Teacher

Lectures were a little boring, but not hard. If u r engaged and participate it will be noticed and appreciated. Prof does not require performance beyond the norm, if u listen carefully to his requirements, then you will pass the course. I was hard-worker whole semester but my final presentation performance wasn't that good, but still got fine grade
Hes a really great instructor. Everyone in the class enjoyed his lectures. He also has a good sense of humour
You can learn British jokes.

He is an amazing instructor, I was really afraid to take my INTG class with him when I saw his rate but now I would like to take this prof again for every English. he is not an easy marker but if you listen carefully to what he wants from you and participate in class lectures you will be all good.

Hi everybody, if you want to skip ALC, you MUST/BETTER NOT choose David's INTG class. And David always give student worst marks!! DO NOT CHOOSE HIS CLASS EVER, WORST TEACHER!!! I want to give David 0 point if I can, but this rate my professor system starts from 1 point.

So terrible teacher , who can't give you anything, loves to have questions answered, likes to drag out classes, likes to drink tea, doesn't give high marks, and is welcome to take his class because no one will rob you.
Too much work and too picky.

Lectures are super long and boring. The grading lacked clear criteria, and almost everyone got the same mark regardless of effort. It feels easy to get a C, but nearly impossible to get a B for the ALC waiver. Because of this, most people just gave up on staying engaged. Only take her if you just need a pass; if you need a B, look elsewhere.
she is a very principled woman, I do not advise you to take her

She will never let you pass ALC (idk if it's the FIC's conspiracy by giving students B- grades so that we all have to do ALC). She said class test was good but all you get is B (no one in class ever got A). However, she's caring, chill her lectures are good for fundamental English but too easy for me. Overall, 6k more? It wastes time and money
Avoid this professor whatever you do, very many homework and she grades very hardly(even you do good, or better than the other, she still grades the same.

Many of you will say that this course is extra-hard. Others will say that the professor is stringent. On the one hand, yes. Class is challenging for those who don't really understand English, but on the other hand, it's the main goal of this course. If you have difficulties with language understanding get ready to learn and practice a lot.
Avoid her with your life, unless you want to take the ACL 099 class.

Would not recommend this prof. She will not grade you more than a B. However, you want to pass this course on B+ to skip ALC099. The professor just said at the beginning of the class that only exceptional students get B+.
not recommend to take this class again

This is a non-credit course, kind of a language course. But I have to say that it is not very easy to get at least B in INTG100 to pass ALC, at least for his students. Maybe because this course is not curve, and you need to get a high grade(B above is 75+ ) However, Jason's standard is not low. I got the highest mark in his two sections but only A-
HE IS REALLY NICE. Just choose him and you won't regret.
Very nice lecture, great sense of communication, but her reading test is a bit hard.
Great teacher who always helps.
